jakarta.faces.component.visit.VisitResult

Package
Description
jakarta.faces.component.visit
 

  • Uses of VisitResult in jakarta.faces.component.visit

    Subclasses with type arguments of type VisitResult in jakarta.faces.component.visit
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    enum 
    VisitResult
    An enum that specifies the possible results of a call to VisitCallback.visit(VisitContext, UIComponent).
    Methods in jakarta.faces.component.visit that return VisitResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract VisitResult
    VisitContext.invokeVisitCallback(UIComponent component, VisitCallback callback)
    Called by UIComponent.visitTree() to visit a single component.
    VisitResult
    VisitContextWrapper.invokeVisitCallback(UIComponent component, VisitCallback callback)
     
    static VisitResult
    VisitResult.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static VisitResult[]
    VisitResult.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    VisitResult
    VisitCallback.visit(VisitContext context, UIComponent target)
    This method is called during component tree visits by VisitContext.invokeVisitCallback() to visit the specified component.
